notes.en: Main stats are assuming [[character:lyney]] is using **[[set:marechaussee-hunter]] (4)**. [[stat:cr]] circlet becomes more viable on non-MH sets.
notes.fr: Les stats principales supposent que [[character:lyney]] est joué en **[[set:marechaussee-hunter]] (4)**. Un diadème [[stat:cr]] devient plus viable sur les sets autres que MH.
notes.it: Le stat principali presuppongono che [[character:lyney]] stia usando **[[set:marechaussee-hunter]] (4)**. La Corona con [[stat:cr]] diventa più valida con altri set.
